holdings.infoBox: XEML is an equity ETF with a total of 50 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 6.06%, Compagnie Financière Richemont at 5.45%, ABB Ltd at 5.34%, Novo Nordisk at 4.99%, and Schneider Electric S.E. at 4.79%.

overview.description: The Xtrackers Europe Market Leaders ETF (XEML) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the STOXX Europe Total Market Leaders index. The fund is passively managed to track an index of the top 40 European companies selected by fundamental criteria and weighted based on market capitalization. XEML was launched on Dec 23, 2025 and is issued by Xtrackers.
infoTable: STOXX Europe Total Market Leaders Index
